SEARCH
Package qupath.ext.astra

Class AstraCellpose2D

java.lang.Object
qupath.ext.biop.cellpose.Cellpose2D
qupath.ext.astra.AstraCellpose2D
public class AstraCellpose2D extends Cellpose2D
ASTRA-owned Cellpose2D subclass. This class owns the ASTRA runtime contract for training image export, training-result handling, validation evaluation, and batch inference. ASTRA policy remains explicit and fail-fast: downstream stacks resolve model-selection policy before invoking this runtime.

    • runBatchInference

      public List<AstraCellpose2D.BatchInferenceResult> runBatchInference(List<AstraCellpose2D.BatchInferenceRequest> requests) throws IOException, InterruptedException
      Run ASTRA batch inference across multiple image entries using a single Cellpose invocation for the whole staged corpus.

      This mirrors the high-level ASTRA training architecture: stage first, execute the Python backend once, then map results back deterministically. The method deliberately does not mutate any image hierarchy; it returns detections grouped by the original parent objects so that ASTRA-side pipelines such as tuning, analysis, or future corpus-level workflows can score or persist results without side effects.

      Throws:
      IOException
      InterruptedException

    • runBatchInference

      public List<AstraCellpose2D.BatchInferenceResult> runBatchInference(AstraCellpose2D.BatchInferenceRequest... requests) throws IOException, InterruptedException
      Throws:
      IOException
      InterruptedException
